title: Weather and health - Canada.ca
content:
## Weather and your health
Being outdoors is good for you!  But too much heat, cold, sun or smog can affect your health.   To provide health-related guidance to Canadians, Environment Canada produces forecasts of air quality, UV and extremes of heat and cold.
Be prepared before you go outside:
- Check the daily Environment Canada forecast for updates on weather conditions that can affect your health.
- Visit the following links to find out more about how the weather can affect your health, including simple steps you can take to protect yourself: Air Quality Health Index UV index and sun protection Heat and humidity Wind chill and cold weather
- Air Quality Health Index
- UV index and sun protection
- Wind chill and cold weather
- Download or order brochures and posters .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
